phrases.intent_en: Do you have thermal pool hotel listings?
phrases.text_local: Termal havuzlu otel listeniz var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Printed hotel lists are usually kept at the desk and handed out by the advisor.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is available on this list.

responses.english: Yes, it is available on this list.

phrases.intent_en: What time is the next Denizli otogar bus?
phrases.text_local: Denizli otogarına bir sonraki otobüs saat kaçta?
phrases.cultural_note: Bus times are subject to change; the advisor has the current schedule.

likely_response.translation_en: There is one every hour on the hour.

responses.english: There is one every hour on the hour.

phrases.intent_en: Is card payment accepted for Museum Pass?
phrases.text_local: Museum Pass için kartla ödeme kabul ediliyor mu?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment methods can vary by terminal; staff confirm the current status.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the South Gate walking path?
phrases.cultural_note: Trailheads from the office can change with site conditions; staff have the latest route advice.

likely_response.translation_en: Enter from the path on the left at the entrance.

responses.english: Enter from the path on the left at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy the Museum Pass Türkiye?
phrases.cultural_note: Turkish information offices often direct specific sales to a staff member rather than a self-service point.

likely_response.translation_en: From the ticket office next to the main gate.

responses.english: From the ticket office next to the main gate.
